context_notes: v1.1 fully SHIPPED & public: main@7e1044a tagged v1.1.0 (+v1.1), develop@30ecc5f, release published, repo public + secret-clean. Gate: build 10/10 / typecheck 0 / lint 0 / unit 960 / ui 183 / integration 82-20. Branches: develop+main only (feature branch deleted). The whole v1.1 build happened amid sustained 429/529 server-limit waves — research+roadmap were done inline on the main loop when subagents died; phases built via ultracode workflows once the API recovered; integration regressions the workflow audits MISSED were caught by running keystones via Bash. LOW debt for v1.2 in milestones/v1.1-MILESTONE-AUDIT.md.
